results.title: Here are the Peoria-area high school football schedules for 2026 season
results.description: Mark your calendars. Here is the full regular-season schedule for 2026 Peoria-area high school football, including the Big 12 and Mid-Illini.

results.title: Brian Lohan fears concussion trend as he warns GAA that head-contact red card standard has ‘slipped this year’
results.description: Clare hurling manager Brian Lohan was unable to give an immediate update on David Reidy who was stretchered off after suffering what looked a serious injury which delayed the All-Ireland quarter-final against Dublin for almost ten minutes.

results.title: Iran stars return to US after being forced to leave following opening World Cup game
results.description: Iran have returned to the United States to face Belgium in the 2026 World Cup, just days after being ordered to leave the country immediately following their opening draw with New Zealand.

results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Ongoing edition becomes second-fastest to 100 goals during Netherlands vs Sweden game
results.description: It was a goal fest in Houston on Saturday albeit one-sided, as Netherlands defeated Sweden 5-1 to get one step closer to the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 32 stage.

results.title: LA Thieves unblemished at CDL Major 4 qualifying
results.description: The Los Angeles Thieves posted the lone sweep on Saturday and remained atop the standings at 5-0 as the third and final week continued in Call of Duty

results.title: Japan rout Tunisia 4-0 as Ueda shines in World Cup’s 1,000th match
results.description: Japan marked the 1,000th match in World Cup history with a commanding 4-0 win over Tunisia in Group F on Saturday, as Ayase Ueda scored twice to send the North Africans out.

results.title: India's ODI Squad vs England: Rohit Sharma, Virat Kohli Picked; No Yashasvi Jaiswal Even After Ton vs Afghanistan
results.description: The Men's Selection Committee on Sunday picked India's squad for the upcoming three-match ODI series against England
